headline: Valero (VLO) Faces A New Oil Supply Test As Hormuz Reopens
summary: US and Iran reached a peace agreement that includes reopening the Strait of Hormuz, a key route for global oil shipments. The deal is expected to increase crude flows from the region, affecting global oil supply and pricing. Refiners such as Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) may see changes in feedstock availability, refining margins, and inventory dynamics as trade routes normalize. Valero Energy enters this new phase with its stock at $244.13 and a multi year return profile, up 47.7% year to date,...
